requirement_topic.en: EDL / MEM Grid-Connection Technical Approval — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings, and MEM Project Licensing
requirement_topic.zh: EDL / 能源矿产部并网技术审批——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数及能源矿产部项目许可
requirement_topic.zht: EDL / 能源礦產部併網技術審批——防孤島（IEC 62116）、50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數及能源礦產部項目許可

summary.en: Grid-connected solar PV installations in Laos require technical approval from EDL (Électricité du Laos) and EDL-T (EDL transmission subsidiary) for connection to the national grid, and MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) project licensing for renewable energy installations. EDL's grid-connection technical review references IEC standards, including IEC 62116 for anti-islanding protection (inverters must detect loss of mains and disconnect within a defined time), IEC 61727 for photovoltaic system grid-interface characteristics, and IEC 61000-series harmonic requirements. Laos's grid operates at 50 Hz, 230 V single-phase, 400 V three-phase — aligned with IEC standards. Inverter firmware protection thresholds and reconnection delays must be validated for Laos's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid parameters. Note: Laos is the 'battery of Southeast Asia'; its grid is hydropower-dominant with growing hybrid hydro-solar and floating solar capacity (e.g. Nam Ngum reservoir projects). EDL also exports electricity to Thailand, Vietnam, and neighbouring countries under BRI-linked grid interconnections, meaning EDL-T interconnection technical requirements may apply to larger projects.
summary.zh: 老挝并网太阳能光伏装置须获EDL（老挝国家电力公司）和EDL-T（EDL输电子公司）的并网技术审批，以及能源矿产部（MEM）的可再生能源装置项目许可。EDL并网技术审查引用IEC标准，包括IEC 62116防孤岛保护（逆变器须在规定时间内检测电网失电并断开）、IEC 61727光伏系统电网接口特性及IEC 61000系列谐波要求。老挝电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相230 V、三相400 V，与IEC标准一致。逆变器固件保护阈值和重连延迟须针对老挝230/400 V、50 Hz电网参数进行验证。注意：老挝被称为"东南亚电池"，其电网以水电为主，混合水光和浮动光伏容量不断增长（例如南俄水库项目）。EDL还通过"一带一路"相关电网互联向泰国、越南及周边国家出口电力，较大项目可能需满足EDL-T互联技术要求。
summary.zht: 寮國併網太陽能光伏裝置須獲EDL（寮國國家電力公司）和EDL-T（EDL輸電子公司）的併網技術審批，以及能源礦產部（MEM）的可再生能源裝置項目許可。EDL併網技術審查引用IEC標準，包括IEC 62116防孤島保護（逆變器須在規定時間內偵測電網失電並斷開）、IEC 61727光伏系統電網接口特性及IEC 61000系列諧波要求。寮國電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相230 V、三相400 V，與IEC標準一致。逆變器韌體保護閾值和重連延遲須針對寮國230/400 V、50 Hz電網參數進行驗證。注意：寮國被稱為「東南亞電池」，其電網以水電為主，混合水光和浮動光伏容量不斷增長（例如南俄水庫項目）。EDL還透過「一帶一路」相關電網互聯向泰國、越南及周邊國家出口電力，較大項目可能需滿足EDL-T互聯技術要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (referenced by EDL technical review for grid-connected PV)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (applicable to grid-interface requirements for PV inverters in Laos)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (referenced in EDL/MEM technical requirements for grid-connected inverters)
MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) Laos — Renewable Energy Development Strategy 2025 and project licensing requirements for grid-connected solar PV
EDL (Électricité du Laos) — Grid-connection technical review and connection agreement requirements for solar PV installations

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004-2018 (inverter technical specifications), and GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters, which superseded GB/T 37408-2019 in China's domestic market). These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid parameters under GB/T 156. Laos operates at 230/400 V, 50 Hz — a 4–5% voltage difference that requires re-validation of firmware protection thresholds. Although Chinese-brand inverters are widely deployed in Laos under BRI-linked projects, this market prevalence does not constitute formal DOSM conformity or EDL/MEM technical approval. Chinese grid-connection certificates do not transfer to Laos EDL grid-connection acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆变器技术规范）和GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求，已取代中国国内市场的GB/T 37408-2019）。上述中国并网文件基于中国依据GB/T 156的220/380 V、50 Hz电网参数。老挝运行参数为230/400 V、50 Hz——电压差约4–5%，需重新验证固件保护阈值。尽管中国品牌逆变器已通过"一带一路"相关项目在老挝广泛部署，但市场普及不构成正式DOSM合格评定或EDL/MEM技术审批。中国并网证书不能转移至老挝EDL并网接受。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆變器技術規範）和GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求，已取代中國國內市場的GB/T 37408-2019）。上述中國併網文件基於中國依據GB/T 156的220/380 V、50 Hz電網參數。寮國運行參數為230/400 V、50 Hz——電壓差約4–5%，需重新驗證韌體保護閾值。儘管中國品牌逆變器已透過「一帶一路」相關項目在寮國廣泛部署，但市場普及不構成正式DOSM合格評定或EDL/MEM技術審批。中國併網證書不能轉移至寮國EDL併網接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages) — China domestic grid: 220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents are based on 220/380 V Chinese grid parameters and are not accepted as EDL/MEM Laos grid-connection evidence. Exporters must: (a) obtain IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory validated for 230/400 V, 50 Hz Laos grid parameters; (b) provide IEC 61727 grid-interface compliance evidence; (c) re-parameterise and document inverter firmware protection thresholds for Laos's 230/400 V grid — do not assume Chinese 220/380 V firmware settings transfer directly; (d) submit to EDL technical review as part of the MEM project licensing and connection application process; (e) for larger utility-scale or BRI-financed projects, confirm EDL-T interconnection technical requirements separately. Market prevalence of Chinese brands in Laos does not remove the requirement to obtain formal DOSM conformity and EDL/MEM technical approval for each new project.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件基于220/380 V中国电网参数，不被老挝EDL/MEM接受为并网证据。出口商须：（a）从ILAC认可实验室取得针对老挝230/400 V、50 Hz电网参数验证的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）提供IEC 61727电网接口合规证据；（c）针对老挝230/400 V电网重新参数化并记录逆变器固件保护阈值，不可假设中国220/380 V固件设置可直接转用；（d）作为能源矿产部项目许可和接入申请程序的一部分，向EDL提交技术审查；（e）对于较大的公用事业规模或"一带一路"融资项目，须另行确认EDL-T互联技术要求。中国品牌在老挝的市场普及不能免除每个新项目取得正式DOSM合格评定和EDL/MEM技术审批的要求。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件基於220/380 V中國電網參數，不被寮國EDL/MEM接受為併網證據。出口商須：（a）從ILAC認可實驗室取得針對寮國230/400 V、50 Hz電網參數驗證的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）提供IEC 61727電網接口合規證據；（c）針對寮國230/400 V電網重新參數化並記錄逆變器韌體保護閾值，不可假設中國220/380 V韌體設置可直接轉用；（d）作為能源礦產部項目許可和接入申請程序的一部分，向EDL提交技術審查；（e）對於較大的公用事業規模或「一帶一路」融資項目，須另行確認EDL-T互聯技術要求。中國品牌在寮國的市場普及不能免除每個新項目取得正式DOSM合格評定和EDL/MEM技術審批的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected solar PV projects in Laos; MEM project licensing and EDL technical grid-connection approval are non-negotiable gates regardless of equipment brand origin or BRI financing
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China's domestic grid operator requirements (State Grid / Southern Power Grid) but does not transfer to Laos EDL grid-connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EDL/MEM Laos grid-connection technical approval requires IEC-standard evidence (IEC 62116, IEC 61727) and firmware re-validation for Laos's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates do not satisfy this gate. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Laos grid parameters and document the configuration before project submission. Confirm current MEM licensing requirements, EDL technical review criteria, and EDL-T interconnection conditions directly with MEM and EDL before finalising the equipment compliance package, as regulatory requirements in Laos are evolving.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 老挝EDL/MEM并网技术审批要求IEC标准证据（IEC 62116、IEC 61727）并针对老挝230/400 V、50 Hz电网重新验证固件——中国GB/T并网证书不满足此门槛。在项目提交前，须针对老挝电网参数重新参数化逆变器固件并记录配置。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向能源矿产部和EDL核实现行MEM许可要求、EDL技术审查标准和EDL-T互联条件，因为老挝监管要求仍在不断演变。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 寮國EDL/MEM併網技術審批要求IEC標準證據（IEC 62116、IEC 61727）並針對寮國230/400 V、50 Hz電網重新驗證韌體——中國GB/T併網證書不滿足此門檻。在項目提交前，須針對寮國電網參數重新參數化逆變器韌體並記錄配置。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向能源礦產部和EDL核實現行MEM許可要求、EDL技術審查標準和EDL-T互聯條件，因為寮國監管要求仍在不斷演變。

requirement_topic.en: DOSM Conformity Assessment and MEM Renewable Energy Project Licensing — Market-Access Gates for PV Inverters in Laos
requirement_topic.zh: DOSM合格评定及能源矿产部可再生能源项目许可——光伏逆变器进入老挝市场的准入门槛
requirement_topic.zht: DOSM合格評定及能源礦產部可再生能源項目許可——光伏逆變器進入寮國市場的准入門檻

summary.en: DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology, under Laos Ministry of Industry and Commerce) is the national standards body responsible for setting and adopting technical standards in Laos. DOSM adopts IEC-based standards for electrical and electronic equipment. Importers and installers of PV inverters in Laos are subject to DOSM conformity requirements for regulated electrical products. MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) administers renewable energy project licensing under the Electricity Law of Laos (Law No. 08/NA, 2011, as amended) and its implementing regulations. Grid-connected solar PV projects require MEM approval covering project licensing, technical specifications, and environmental review before EDL grid connection. The combination of DOSM product conformity and MEM project licensing constitutes the formal regulatory gate for solar PV inverters in Laos, regardless of whether the equipment is already commonly deployed in the market under BRI-linked projects.
summary.zh: DOSM（标准计量局，隶属老挝工业商务部）是负责老挝技术标准制定和采用的国家标准机构。DOSM针对电气和电子设备采用基于IEC的标准。老挝光伏逆变器进口商和安装商须遵守DOSM针对受监管电气产品的合格评定要求。能源矿产部（MEM）依据老挝《电力法》（第08/NA号法，2011年，经修订）及其实施细则管理可再生能源项目许可。并网太阳能光伏项目在接入EDL电网前须获得MEM批准，涵盖项目许可、技术规格和环境审查。DOSM产品合格评定和MEM项目许可共同构成老挝太阳能光伏逆变器的正式监管门槛，无论设备是否已通过"一带一路"相关项目在市场中普遍部署。
summary.zht: DOSM（標準計量局，隸屬寮國工業商務部）是負責寮國技術標準制定和採用的國家標準機構。DOSM針對電氣和電子設備採用基於IEC的標準。寮國光伏逆變器進口商和安裝商須遵守DOSM針對受監管電氣產品的合格評定要求。能源礦產部（MEM）依據寮國《電力法》（第08/NA號法，2011年，經修訂）及其實施細則管理可再生能源項目許可。併網太陽能光伏項目在接入EDL電網前須獲得MEM批准，涵蓋項目許可、技術規格和環境審查。DOSM產品合格評定和MEM項目許可共同構成寮國太陽能光伏逆變器的正式監管門檻，無論設備是否已透過「一帶一路」相關項目在市場中普遍部署。

standards_or_laws: Laos Electricity Law No. 08/NA (2011, as amended) — primary law governing electricity generation, transmission, distribution, and connection in Laos
MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines) Laos — renewable energy project licensing and technical review requirements
DOSM (Department of Standards and Metrology) Laos — conformity assessment for regulated electrical products, adopting IEC-based standards
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems (adopted as reference standards by DOSM for PV equipment conformity)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to DOSM's conformity assessment for Laos. Chinese PV inverters sold domestically in China undergo CQC or CGC voluntary certification under GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 frameworks. These Chinese voluntary certificates, while useful as supplementary documentation, are not substitutes for DOSM conformity assessment under Laos's own IEC-aligned regulatory framework. For MEM project licensing, Chinese NEA (National Energy Administration) distributed or utility-scale PV project approvals are China-domestic authorities with no legal standing in Laos regulatory process. Chinese state-owned enterprise involvement in BRI-financed Laos projects does not remove the requirement for DOSM conformity or MEM licensing of equipment used in those projects.
summary.zh: 中国没有与DOSM老挝合格评定直接对应的机制。中国国内销售的光伏逆变器在GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004框架下进行CQC或CGC自愿认证。上述中国自愿证书虽可作为补充文件，但不能替代老挝自身IEC对齐监管框架下的DOSM合格评定。对于能源矿产部项目许可，中国国家能源局（NEA）的分布式或公用事业规模光伏项目批准是中国国内机构，在老挝监管程序中不具法律效力。中国国有企业参与"一带一路"融资的老挝项目，不能免除相关项目所用设备的DOSM合格评定或MEM许可要求。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與DOSM寮國合格評定直接對應的機制。中國國內銷售的光伏逆變器在GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004框架下進行CQC或CGC自願認證。上述中國自願證書雖可作為補充文件，但不能替代寮國自身IEC對齊監管框架下的DOSM合格評定。對於能源礦產部項目許可，中國國家能源局（NEA）的分散式或公用事業規模光伏項目批准是中國國內機構，在寮國監管程序中不具法律效力。中國國有企業參與「一帶一路」融資的寮國項目，不能免除相關項目所用設備的DOSM合格評定或MEM許可要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — basis for CQC/CGC voluntary certification in China
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
China NEA distributed PV policy — applicable to Chinese domestic project approvals only, not transferable to Laos MEM licensing

gap.en: Gap: DOSM conformity and MEM project licensing are both required regulatory gates for solar PV inverters in Laos and are separate from any Chinese domestic certification or project approval. Exporters and project developers must: (a) confirm current DOSM regulated-product scope and applicable IEC-based conformity requirements for the specific inverter model; (b) obtain MEM project licensing covering technical specifications before grid connection; (c) ensure inverter IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence and IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence is available to support both DOSM conformity and MEM/EDL technical review; (d) not assume that BRI project precedents or Chinese brand prevalence in the Laos market grants exemption from DOSM or MEM formal processes. Regulatory capacity in Laos is developing — confirm current requirements with DOSM and MEM directly.
gap.zh: 差距：DOSM合格评定和能源矿产部项目许可均是老挝太阳能光伏逆变器的必要监管门槛，独立于任何中国国内认证或项目批准。出口商和项目开发商须：（a）确认DOSM现行受监管产品范围及适用于特定逆变器型号的基于IEC的合格评定要求；（b）在并网前取得涵盖技术规格的MEM项目许可；（c）确保逆变器IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据和IEC 62116防孤岛证据齐备，以支持DOSM合格评定和MEM/EDL技术审查；（d）不得假设"一带一路"项目先例或中国品牌在老挝市场的普及可豁免DOSM或MEM正式程序。老挝监管能力仍在发展中——须直接向DOSM和能源矿产部核实现行要求。
gap.zht: 差距：DOSM合格評定和能源礦產部項目許可均是寮國太陽能光伏逆變器的必要監管門檻，獨立於任何中國國內認證或項目批准。出口商和項目開發商須：（a）確認DOSM現行受監管產品範圍及適用於特定逆變器型號的基於IEC的合格評定要求；（b）在併網前取得涵蓋技術規格的MEM項目許可；（c）確保逆變器IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據和IEC 62116防孤島證據齊備，以支持DOSM合格評定和MEM/EDL技術審查；（d）不得假設「一帶一路」項目先例或中國品牌在寮國市場的普及可豁免DOSM或MEM正式程序。寮國監管能力仍在發展中——須直接向DOSM和能源礦產部核實現行要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — DOSM conformity for regulated electrical products and MEM project licensing are both required before grid connection; EDL will not connect a project without MEM approval
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese CQC/CGC voluntary certificates and NEA project approvals are China-domestic instruments with no legal standing in Laos DOSM or MEM processes

source.publisher: MEM (Ministry of Energy and Mines), Lao PDR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Both DOSM conformity assessment and MEM project licensing are formal gates for solar PV inverters entering the Laos market or connecting to the EDL grid. Chinese domestic certifications (CQC/CGC under GB/T 37408) and Chinese NEA project approvals do not substitute for these Laos requirements. Engage with DOSM directly to confirm current regulated-product scope and IEC conformity documentation requirements for the specific inverter model before shipment. Confirm MEM licensing requirements and EDL technical review process with MEM and EDL before project commitment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DOSM合格评定和能源矿产部项目许可均是太阳能光伏逆变器进入老挝市场或接入EDL电网的正式门槛。中国国内认证（基于GB/T 37408的CQC/CGC）和中国国家能源局项目批准不能替代上述老挝要求。在出货前，请直接与DOSM确认现行受监管产品范围及特定逆变器型号的IEC合格评定文件要求。在项目承诺前，请向能源矿产部和EDL确认MEM许可要求和EDL技术审查程序。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DOSM合格評定和能源礦產部項目許可均是太陽能光伏逆變器進入寮國市場或接入EDL電網的正式門檻。中國國內認證（基於GB/T 37408的CQC/CGC）和中國國家能源局項目批准不能替代上述寮國要求。在出貨前，請直接與DOSM確認現行受監管產品範圍及特定逆變器型號的IEC合格評定文件要求。在項目承諾前，請向能源礦產部和EDL確認MEM許可要求和EDL技術審查程序。
